CodeSnippet.title: Code Snippet
CodeSnippet.description: A shared or saved code snippet, optionally a fork of another snippet

title.description: Optional title for the code snippet

expiresAt.description: Timestamp when this snippet expires (createdAt + 30 days)

parentCodeId.description: Document ID of original snippet if this is a fork

tags.description: Custom tags added to the snippet

snippets/{snippetId}.description: Storage for all shared code snippets
